rag_rules: Use `assume "label": expression;` to express input assumptions.
Place assumptions and guarantees within an `annex agree { ... };` block.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts are scoped to their owning component.
Output assignments are valid only in implementation annexes and must target existing outputs.
Guarantees should relate visible outputs to visible inputs.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use exact names from the model index; do not invent identifiers.
AGREE expressions can only reference identifiers visible in the current scope.
anti_patterns: Do not include AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions unless they are exposed as typed ports or constants.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
